subject: Onix — a massive rock-serpent Pokemon composed of linked boulders
description: A towering rock-serpent fills the frame, its body made of a chain of large dark grey boulders or stone spheres. The creature's angular head dominates the upper portion of the composition, with white eyes visible. The low-angle perspective emphasizes the creature's immense size. The background is warm amber and golden, creating a stark contrast with the dark grey rocky body. The form curves and recedes into the background, conveying great scale.
foreground: dark grey boulder-chain serpent body, angular head with white eyes
background: warm amber and golden hues, rocky terrain
